fragility_points: Single-minute close on one venue creates path sensitivity.
Extreme market pricing can understate residual volatility risk.
key_assumptions: Polymarket resolves off the ordinary Binance BTC/USDT 12:00 PM ET one-minute close on Apr 15.
BTC does not suffer a >~6% downside move into the settlement minute.
main_logical_chain: Verify exact settlement mechanics and timing on Polymarket and Binance.
Measure current distance between Binance spot and the 70k threshold.
Treat the event as a short-horizon drawdown-avoidance problem rather than an upside-call problem.
Reserve material tail probability for crypto volatility and minute-specific settlement noise.
main_thesis: BTC is already materially above 70k with under two days left, so the base-rate favors a Yes resolution despite nontrivial short-horizon volatility and single-minute settlement risk.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.
Binance spot during this run was about 74,227.55.
source_quality_view: Source quality is strong because Binance is the governing data surface and Polymarket clearly states the contract mechanics; independence is medium but source-of-truth ambiguity is low.
strongest_disconfirmers: BTC can move more than 6% in under two days, and the contract settles on a single one-minute close.
strongest_supports: Binance spot during the run was about 74.23k, roughly 6% above the threshold.
Recent Binance daily/hourly history showed BTC trading mostly above 70k rather than right on the line.
timing_relevance: The market resolves at 12:00 PM America/New_York on 2026-04-15, about 41.5 hours after this run's Binance verification.
unresolved_ambiguities: Minor residual operational ambiguity remains only if Binance or Polymarket handling changes near settlement.
what_would_change_view: A sharp drawdown toward 70k, Binance-specific instability, or a clarified contract interpretation changing the relevant candle would reduce the estimate.
